title: Legacy Medical Device Security Frameworks: Companion Artifacts
description: Open-source companion artifact suite for the paper 'A Practical Cybersecurity Framework for Legacy Medical Devices'. Five integrated practitioner-oriented frameworks comprising: the Medical Device Risk Score (MDRS) reference calculator with irreversibility-driven tier floor; STRIDE-HC threat-modelling templates for the dual network/physical attack surface; Control Justification Record templates aligned to ISO 14971, AAMI TIR57, and FDA 524B; a Dockerised empirical test harness; and a software reference design for the inline service-port multi-factor authentication shim (Pattern C).
